summary: Comprehensive frontend-only E2E test of CKP Tétouan landing page on deployed preview. All 18 features from the request verified successfully across desktop (1440px) and mobile (375px). Zero console errors. All 6 WhatsApp CTAs correctly point to wa.me/212611992124. Loader fades after ~1s. Hero, counters, services scroller (prev/next), Human Motion hotspots + zone pills, recovery steps (01-04), testimonials carousel, appointment section (address/phone), footer, mobile menu toggle, and sticky FAB all working as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: All components are reasonably sized (<300 lines). No file >700 lines.
data-testid attributes well applied across interactive elements.
WHATSAPP_URL centralized in /lib/brand.js — good DRY pattern.
Hero uses heavy mousemove listener — consider throttling for low-end devices (minor perf, not a bug).
No broken images observed; all Unsplash CDN images loaded.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only landing page; backend untouched. All testids stable. WhatsApp link pattern: wa.me/212611992124. Mobile menu opens via data-testid=mobile-menu-toggle and renders data-testid=mobile-menu (removed from DOM when closed). Counters animate via IntersectionObserver (threshold 0.4) — scroll into view before reading text. Services scroller uses scrollBy on data-testid=services-scroller — use scrollLeft to detect movement.
verified_features: All 6 WhatsApp CTAs href contain wa.me/212611992124
6 hotspots + 6 zone-pills present; clicking hotspot-knee shows 'Genou', zone-pill-ankle shows 'Cheville'
address '286 N° 2' and phone '06 11 99 21 24' present in appointment section
sticky-whatsapp-fab visible at top, middle, and bottom scroll positions
